sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n95445" key="smalero/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σμᾰλερός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ά</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>,= <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μαλερός</foreign>, Poet.<sense id="n95445.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">de herb.</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">101</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
